features: Enjoy a colourful fusion of natural lavender and bergamot finished with a flourish of red geranium
Automatically releases fragrance into your home
Refill for Air Wick freshmatic max kit
Bursts of fragrance to constantly freshen your home and neutralise odours
description: One spritz of Air Wick Freshmatic Max Air Freshener is enough to fill a room. Choose the setting from subtle fragrance for smaller rooms to a vibrant blast for larger ones for continual release. This delicately scented air freshener refill is designed for use with the Air Wick Freshmatic Max Automatic Spray. Enhance your home’s scent story with Air Wick Freshmatic Automatic Sprays. Enjoy a colourful fusion of natural lavender and bergamot finished with a flourish of red geranium. Air Wick Freshmatic Automatic Sprays release bursts of continuous fresh fragrance so your home always smells welcoming. Just set the air freshener to your preferred fragrance intensity setting and enjoy while the purple lavender meadow refill neutralises odours. Fragrances your home for up to 60 days when on low setting. Note: Date mentioned on the item is manufactured date and not the expiry date.
